OverviewApplication
About Us

Propel is on a mission to empower low-income Americans by simplifying access to government benefits with modern technology. We're a passionate team of 100 Propellers - all working to help our users get through the month, every month.

The Role

Propel owns Willoughby, a licensed entity building the first app-based digital Medicare brokerage, initially focused on dual Medicare-Medicaid users.

We’re looking for a Senior Associate to help build and scale the operational foundation of our business. This is a highly cross-functional, individual-contributor role focused on automation, operations, analytics, and partner execution.

You’ll work closely with Product, Engineering, Data, Compliance, and GTM to reduce manual work, improve reliability, and enable Propel to scale into new markets and partnerships.

The core of what you’ll do
Back Office Automation

Build and own internal-facing tools that automate core backoffice and post-enrollment workflows

Identify high-impact opportunities to reduce manual effort, improve accuracy, and increase operational efficiency

Partner with Product and Engineering to scope, ship, and iterate quickly on automation

Operations & Partnerships

Support and increasingly own key operational partner relationships, including FMOs

Manage carrier contracting and onboarding to enab

Help Shape One of Canada’s Fastest‑Growing Regions

Halifax Regional Municipality (HRM) is a vibrant, diverse, and forward‑looking municipality that serves as the economic, cultural, and educational hub of Atlantic Canada. Home to more than half a million residents across over 200 communities, the Halifax region combines urban energy, suburban growth, rural character, and over 400 km of coastline to create an exceptional quality of life. HRM is experiencing one of the most sustained periods of population and development growth in its history.

As the region evolves toward a future of greater density, mobility, and complexity, the importance of thoughtful, credible planning leadership has never been greater.

Founded in 1976 in Balmoral, New Brunswick, A.L.P.A. Equipment Ltd. (A.L.P.A) is a proudly family-owned and operated company that has grown into a leading supplier of forestry and construction equipment across Atlantic Canada and Eastern Quebec. With full-service branches in Balmoral, Fredericton, Edmundston, Moncton (NB), and Truro (NS), and a 63,000 sq. ft. manufacturing facility in Eel River Crossing, A.L.P.A. is known for its engineering excellence and local innovation  - most notably the Canadian-made Landrich Track Harvester. Representing top brands like Ponsse, Hyundai, JCB, Rotobec, and Fuchs, and employing over 150 people, the company offers full-service support and operator training. A.L.P.A. continues to be recognized for its leadership, receiving major government investment and actively supporting workforce development and education initiatives.

KPMG Corporate Finance Inc. is the Ontario Securities Commission (OSC) regulated entity through which KPMG LLP's investment banking services are provided in Canada. KPMG's Corporate Finance services are principally comprised of merger, acquisition and divestiture advisory and capital advisory services.  

 

We offer independent financial advisory and investment banking services to both private and public companies. Acting independently of financing sources, we provide clients with pure, objective advice, focusing on strategies that can help meet corporate objectives. We have an extensive international network of over 2,600 corporate finance professionals working from 160 offices in 86 countries thus providing KPMG Corporate Finance with a broad local reach and established contacts.

 Job Posts Background Director, Identity Data And Workflow Engineering (Global Security)

BACKGROUND DIRECTOR, IDENTITY DATA AND WORKFLOW ENGINEERING (GLOBAL SECURITY)

What is the opportunity?
The Director of Identity Data & Workflow Engineering leads the engineering strategy and delivery of identity data services, workflow automation, and cross-product IAM APIs across the Enterprise Identity and Access Management (EIAM) ecosystem. This role owns the engineering capabilities that power identity request workflows, privileged account inventory, global directory services, and the API layer that enables consistent, secure access to IAM capabilities across the enterprise.

Identity data and workflow engineering is foundational to delivering secure, efficient, and scalable identity services. The quality and accessibility of identity data — and the workflows and APIs that act on it — directly determine how quickly the organization can onboard users, detect risk, and respond to regulatory demands. This leader will build and operate the platforms that turn identity data into a strategic asset and provide a trusted foundation for downstream consumers including controls, reporting, governance, and emerging AI capabilities.

What will you do?

Solution Delivery, development, engineering and integration

 Job Posts EDIFECs Developer – 68261031

EDIFECS DEVELOPER – 68261031

About the role
As an Edifecs Developer, you will make an impact by designing, developing, and supporting healthcare EDI solutions that enable accurate, compliant, and timely data exchange across payer and provider ecosystems. You will be a valued member of the Healthcare IT team and will work collaboratively with business analysts, integration teams, trading partners, and production support teams.

In this role, you will:

Design, develop, and implement EDI solutions using the Edifecs platform, including SpecBuilder, XEngine (Transaction Management), and Edifecs Enterprise.
Build, configure, and maintain EDI transaction sets and trading partner maps for healthcare standards such as 837, 835, 270/271, 276/277, 834, and 278.
Develop and manage workflows using Smart Trading and Smart Engine to support partner onboarding and transaction processing.
Collaborate with internal teams, vendors, and trading partners to translate business and functional requirements into technical EDI specifications.
Monitor EDI transactions, troubleshoot errors, support production issues, and ensure timely resolution across environments.

LEAD REACT NATIVE DEVELOPER

Position Description:
We are seeking a Lead Developer with 10+ years of software engineering experience, including 5+ years of hands-on experience in React Native, JavaScript, and TypeScript, to lead the design and development of high-performance, scalable, and secure cross-platform mobile applications. This role blends deep technical expertise with leadership, driving mobile architecture, platform strategy, and engineering excellence across teams.

Eligible locations: Halifax, NS / St. John’s, NL / Fredericton or Moncton, NB / Stratford, PEI
Work model: Hybrid – 2/3 days per week onsite

Design, build, and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using React Native.
Lead mobile architecture decisions ensuring scalability, performance, security, and maintainability.
Establish and enforce coding standards, reusable patterns, and engineering best practices.

Integrate REST APIs, GraphQL, Firebase, analytics tools, crash reporting, push notifications, and third-party SDKs.

 Job Posts Mobile DevOps Specialist

MOBILE DEVOPS SPECIALIST

Position Description:
CGI is seeking a Mobile DevOps Specialist to support and enhance our internal mobile development platform and build infrastructure. This role combines mobile DevOps, cloud operations, and system administration to support iOS, Android, and Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) engineering teams. Our client is an automation-first organization and rely heavily on CI/CD pipelines, scripting, and infrastructure-as-code to improve developer experience and streamline mobile build and release processes.

This is a permanent full-time opportunity in a hybrid work environment (2 days per week in office). Locations: Halifax, Moncton, St. John’s, Fredericton, Stratford.

Your future duties and responsibilities:

Provide technical support for mobile build environments and developer tooling across iOS and Android platforms.
Troubleshoot and maintain tools including Xcode, xcodebuild, CocoaPods, Swift Package Manager (SPM), Gradle, Android SDK, and Fastlane.
Manage and support macOS and Linux build infrastructure, including CI/CD runners and mobile build environments.
Support and optimize GitLab CI/CD pipelines, runners, artifact management, and release automation workflows.
Manage Apple Developer certificates, provisioning profiles, Android signing credentials, and CI/CD secrets.
Support AWS operational requests, including IAM roles,

 Job Posts Solution Architect – NetOps

SOLUTION ARCHITECT – NETOPS

About Compugen
Compugen is Canada’s largest privately-owned Technology Ally. To innovate industries, transform businesses, connect communities, and drive meaningful change, we must think bigger, reach broader, and act bolder. Through knowledge, curiosity, and collaboration, Compugen helps organizations delivering experience by design. This is what it means to be human-centered and technology-enabled.

Dreaming, designing, and delivering isn’t just a mantra for us — it’s a way of life. We believe that technology is the conduit, but our people – they are the connection that truly makes the magic happen!

Our Culture
We are a human-centered culture where we prioritize your well-being and are invested in helping you reach your fullest potential. We’re not only focused on achieving our goals — we’re dedicated to helping you achieve yours.

If you’re relentlessly curious, driven to make a difference, and collaborative at the core, then you belong with us.

Position Overview:
We are seeking an experienced IT Architect (NetOps / SysOps) to support a global initiative for a 6-month Remote Contract. The selected candidate will play a key role in mapping and documenting network and system infrastructures across multiple regions worldwide.

Key Responsibilities:

Conduct comprehensive network and systems mapping across global environment

SUMMARY OF DUTIES

Under the supervision of the deputy Head of Cooperation at the Embassy of Canada in Haiti and in close collaboration with the development team at Global Affairs Canada (GAC) in Ottawa, the Senior Development Officer supports all phases of international assistance programming and project management in Haiti. The Officer actively participates in identifying needs, planning, and monitoring the implementation of projects by external executing agencies in the fields of security and humanitarian assistance in Haïti. The officer also contributes to sector analysis and coordinates with other stakeholders, including local government, civil society, non-governmental organization, embassies and other technical and financial partners. Under general supervision of the Consul (Management & Consular), the Common Services Coordinator provides coordination and administrative services as part of the Common Services (corporate services) team. Duties include, but are not limited to: 



Coordination of services related to the relocation of Canada-based staff and payments under the Foreign Service Directives (National Joint Council of the Public Service of Canada);

Managing the mission’s shared SharePoint (intranet) site;

title: Growth & Insights Lead, Public Sector
description:
Growth & Insights Lead, Public Sector
Location

USA

Employment Type

Full time

Location Type

Remote

Department

Public Partnerships and Policy

Compensation
Base Salary $150K – $180K • Offers Equity
OverviewApplication

About Us

Propel is on a mission to empower low-income Americans by simplifying access to government benefits with modern technology. We're a passionate team of 100 Propellers - all working to help our users get through the month, every month.

The Role

Millions of Americans navigate a social safety net that too often works against them - confusing enrollment, broken eligibility systems, policies that never reach the people they're meant to serve. Propel exists to change that. And increasingly, the path to change runs through the states that administer these programs.

When Propel builds credible relationships with state agencies, we don't just grow the business - we create direct pathways to improving life for the people we serve. A state that understands how its users are falling through the cracks can actually fix it. But that requires state leaders to know what Propel sees and trust the source.

The Growth & Insights Lead will make that possible by reaching the right agency decision-makers, producing insights grounded in real user experience, and developing messaging that earns trust in a complex public sector environment. This is a full-cycle role: the right person will generate the idea, pull the data, and take it all the way to market themselves. S

title: Senior Field Service Representative
description:
Welcome to the Kraken Robotics Career Center

Senior Field Service Representative

Senior Field Service Representative

NEW CAREER OPPORTUNITY




Build your career with Kraken Robotics. Make a difference to others. If innovation drives you, and you want a career that makes a difference to the world, helping humanity overcome the challenges in our oceans – safely, efficiently, and sustainably – then come join us at Kraken Robotics.

 

Kraken Robotics is currently recruiting for a Senior Field Service Representative at our office in Mount Pearl, NL. 




The Senior Field Service Representative, reporting to the Service Manager, will build comprehensive knowledge across Krakens’ product line to provide support in the operation, maintenance and repair of Kraken products. This will be a Hybrid position split between office/workshop responsibilities and Field Service engagements. Approximately 50% Field based/50% office based including a mix of Offshore & Nearshore Field Service engagements.

Roles and Responsibilities

Field responsibilities include:

Field Service Calls - Leading field teams in the execution of field support engagements, both scheduled planned maintenance activities and corrective unplanned
Product Demonstrations - execution of product demonstrations, including internal initiatives and customer-led demonstrations such as Naval exercises. Includes installation, operation and maintenance of equipment, execution of mission objectives, reporting.
Operations Support

About Us

Propel is on a mission to empower low-income Americans by simplifying access to government benefits with modern technology. We're a passionate team of 100 Propellers - all working to help our users get through the month, every month. 

The Role

We launched the Propel Marketplace to connect our ~5M monthly active users to products, services, and exclusive offers from leading brands across grocery and retail, healthcare, telecoms, financial services, and auto. It has grown into a powerful, industry-leading performance tool for our partners and a critical revenue driver for Propel. We have strong product market fit, our users love our app, and our customers love that we have a significant reach and engagement with our users. 

We’re looking for an Insights & Strategy Lead to own our Car Insurance and Financial Services verticals. 

Here's how you'll impact the company

Drive account revenue growth through data-driven upselling and optimisation: Partner closely with Customer Success to identify and quantify high-impact upsell opportunities, build compelling data-driven sales materials, and maintain critical business intelligence on key accounts to inform expansion strategies 

AI fluency: You proactively explore ways to use AI tools to deepen your analysis and improve team workflows (for example, using Claude or Gem

Position Details

Department of Health and Community Services

Reporting to the Senior Manager of Health Workforce Planning, the Manager plays a critical role in the development and implementation of comprehensive workforce strategies that support a sustainable, well-distributed, and highly skilled health workforce across the province in partnership with NL Health Services and other stakeholders. The Manager is responsible for workforce data through the development, maintenance, and continuous improvement of a provincial minimum data set (MDS), enabling consistent, high quality health workforce data collection ensuring that workforce information is accurate, timely, and suitable for advanced analytics, modeling, and decision making. The Manager works within the strategic and operational plans of the Department of Health and Community Services to develop recommendations to address key workforce issues and trends. Lokasjon: Hamar , Oslo
Opsjoner: 3 + 3 måneder
Søknadsfrist: 05.06.2026, kl 12:00

Forsvarsbygg har behov for én konsulent til å bistå med koordinering og prosjektledelse for planlegging, gjennomføring og oppfølging av tiltak etter finansiell revisjon. Konsulenten skal ha en operativ rolle med ansvar for å drive fremdrift og sikre fremgang i arbeidet.
Leveransen skal sikre en helhetlig, strukturert og etterprøvbar oppfølging av tiltak etter revisjon, og vil innebære følgende leveranser (ikke uttømmende):

Etablere og forvalte en strukturert tiltaksoversikt med klart definerte felter (eks. ansvar, frist, status, risiko, avhengigheter og dokumentasjon)

Sikre løpende oppdatering av tiltaksoversikten

Prioritere tiltak basert på dokumentert risiko og konsekvens

Utarbeide månedlig statusrapport som inneholder oversikt over fremdrift, identifiserte risikoer og forslag til tiltak

Omega 365 Consulting er en ledende leverandør av dyktig prosjektpersonell til aktører innen olje, gass, fornybar energi og infrastruktur. Vi tilbyr et bredt utvalg av konsulentoppdrag, inkludert mange av de mest spennende prosjektene i Norge og i utlandet.




Detaljer:

Varighet: 17.08.2026 - 31.12.2026
Lokasjon: Oslo
Opsjoner: 6 + 6 + 6 måneder
Søknadsfrist: 01.06.2026, kl 12:00




Beskrivelse av oppdraget

Konsulenten skal bidra til å styrke Stortinget sin frontend utviklingskapasitet, og skal delta i videreutvikling og modernisering av Stortinget sine digitale tjenester. Konsulenten vil inngå i et smidig team som arbeider med utvikling av ny funksjonalitet, forbedring av eksisterende løsninger, samt sikring av god kodekvalitet og arkitektur.

Konsulentens ansvar og arbeidsoppgaver vil i hovedsak være knyttet til:

Utvikle løsninger som støtter det parlamentariske arbeidet.

designe og utvikle grensesnitt.

Kommunikasjonsrådgiver til SAMT-BU

Omega 365 Consulting er en ledende leverandør av dyktig prosjektpersonell til aktører innen olje, gass, fornybar energi og infrastruktur. Vi tilbyr et bredt utvalg av konsulentoppdrag, inkludert mange av de mest spennende prosjektene i Norge og i utlandet.

Lokasjon: Oslo
Omfang: 50 %
Opsjoner: 6 + 6 måneder
Søknadsfrist: 29.05.2026, kl 12:00





Beskrivelse av oppdraget

Avd. Brukeropplevelse og datadeling (BOD) i Digitaliseringsdirektoratet (Digdir) har behov for 1 kommunikasjonsrådgiver/-konsulent i ca 50 % til SAMT-BU (Sammenhengende tjenester for barn og unge).

SAMT-BU er et samarbeidsprosjekt om datadrevet tjenesteutvikling og sammenhengende tjenester for barn og unge – fra barnehage til høyere utdanning.

Prosjektets fulle tittel er Felles løft: Sammenhengende tjenester for barn og unge.

Felles Løft: Sammenhengende tjenester for barn og unge (SAMT BU) jobber for at barn, unge, foreldre og ansatte skal få bedre og mer helhetlige tjenester. Gjennom SAMT BU bygger vi et felles grunnlag for samarbeid på tvers av sektorer – med økt kunnskap om datadrevet tjenesteutvikling og sømløse brukerreiser. Backend- utvikler til Team Produkt

Omega 365 Consulting er en ledende leverandør av dyktig prosjektpersonell til aktører innen olje, gass, fornybar energi og infrastruktur. Vi tilbyr et bredt utvalg av konsulentoppdrag, inkludert mange av de mest spennende prosjektene i Norge og i utlandet.




Detaljer:

Varighet: 03.08.2026 - 3 år
Lokasjon: Bergen
Opsjoner: 1 år
Søknadsfrist: 02.06.2026, kl 12:00




Beskrivelse av oppdraget

Til arbeidet med å videreutvikle vår backend-applikasjon, utvikle klient-vennlige REST-API'er, sørge for høy kvalitet i dataene og tjenesten, samt imøtekomme behovene for administrasjon, uthenting, import og eksport av takstdata, har Team Produkt behov for en erfaren backend-utvikler som har erfaring med følgende særlig relevante teknologier: Kotlin og Spring Boot.

Andre relevante teknologier er:

Kafka

Redis

GCP

Kubernetes

Terraform

Du blir en del av Team Produkt, der du også vil jobbe med Team Partnerdata, som er vår primære brukergruppe internt i Entur, i tillegg til et par brukere hos kollektiv-partnere. Det er en viktig del av oppdraget å forstå brukernes behov og levere det som gir dem verdi i deres arbeidshverdag. Samtidig som brukerne ihensyntas følger Entur europeiske standarder for modellering av blant annet rute- og takstdata (e.g. Transmodel og NeTEx), som også må ihensy

Manager of Fund Development & Communications

 
Posted: 05/07/2026  Executive and Management

About Us
Award-winning. Inspiring. Values-driven. Entrepreneurial spirit. These are some of the words that describe Stella’s Circle, a leading social justice organization that works with over 1,500 people each year, championing growth and transformation through housing, mental health, and employment.
 
The Position
The Manager of Fund Development and Communications is responsible for the planning, coordination, and oversight of fund development and communications functions to support organizational sustainability, brand integrity, and stakeholder engagement. The role oversees fundraising activities, communications strategy, media relations, and team operations to ensure consistent, aligned, and effective messaging across the organization. As a member of the Management Team, the Manager contributes to organizational planning, cross-functional coordination, and advancement of strategic priorities, ensuring that communications and fundraising efforts support program delivery, organizational visibility, and long-term growth.
What You’ll Do
Fund Development & Donor Relations

Leads the development and implementation of a comprehensive fund development strategy, including individual giving, corporate partnerships, foundation funding, and government opportunities, to support organizational revenue targets

Mechanical Engineer/Hardware Lead

Venor is proud to partner with ReelData in their search for a Mechanical Engineer / Hardware Lead to join their team in Dartmouth, Nova Scotia.

ReelData develops intelligent aquaculture technology, and its ReelWeight platform delivers reliable, field ready solutions in demanding real world environments. This role is central to advancing the product line, while driving R&D and continuous improvement initiatives for future product iterations.

Through its flagship SaaS platforms, ReelAppetite and ReelWeight, ReelData helps customers optimize feeding efficiency, monitor fish growth, and make smarter operational decisions. As a fast-growing company at the forefront of digital transformation in aquaculture, ReelData offers a collaborative, mission-driven environment where technology and sustainability intersect.

Executive Assistant

Achieve Financial helps clients achieve financial independence with personalized solutions. Our mission is to empower you to navigate the complexities of financial management with confidence and clarity.

Reporting to the Account Executive, the Executive Assistant will be a highly-organized, driven, administrative professional who thrives in a dynamic environment. 

What You’ll Do

Manage calendars, scheduling meetings, and coordinating appointments with internal and external stakeholders
Handle email correspondence, phone calls, and document preparation on behalf of Account Executive.

Junior or Intermediate Biologist

SEM is currently seeking a Junior or Intermediate Biologist for a three month contract, from June 1 to September 1, to be based out of our St. John’s office. This contract will have a possibility of extension.  

The biologist will assist the SEM team in completing project-based aquatics work for a variety of clients across Newfoundland and Labrador. 

Responsibilities 

•    Assisting with various freshwater aquatic surveys  
•    Data analysis, interpretation of technical reporting and report preparation.
•    Preparing federal and provincial permit applications.
•    Utilizing various field instruments for the collection of data while maintaining accurate records as per company quality assurance/quality control protocols.
•    Training will be provided for specialized data collection tasks.  

Requirements

•    Post-secondary education in Biology or a related field of study 
•    A passion for aquatic biology and the outdoors
•    Valid driver’s license
•    Willingness to travel extensively around the province during this contract
•    Willingness to work overtime and long hours in challenging conditions (heat or cold, rain, insects. etc.)

Other

•    Positive attitude and team player
•    Basic to Intermediate Microsoft product skills

CONTRACT · HUMAN RESOURCES & PEOPLE
HR Officer

Venor has partnered with the College of Physicians & Surgeons of Nova Scotia (CPSNS) to recruit an HR Officer for a 21-month contract.

CPSNS serves and protects the public by effectively regulating the province’s medical profession in accordance with the Medical Act and its regulations. CPSNS is a culture of listening – listening to the public and the profession. The College prides itself in ensuring an environment that is respectful, safe and humble. CPSNS values engaging with Nova Scotians and the communities served across the province. Serving the public, the College ensures Nova Scotia’s physicians and surgeons are qualified, competent and fit to practice medicine to provide the best care possible to patients.

As an HR Officer, you will play a key role in supporting the full employee lifecycle while ensuring the effective delivery of payroll, benefits, and human resources programs. This position is integral to maintaining accurate and compliant HR operations, from compensation and benefits administration to recruitment, onboarding, and employee support. General Manager

Job Title: General Manager  

Location: Wabush, NL 

Venor is thrilled to partner with our client, Industrial Rubber Company (IRC) in their search for a General Manager. IRC supplies critical rubber lining and piping solutions to the mining industry across Eastern Canada. With shops in Bathurst, NB and Wabush, NL, they are trusted by major mining operations for their expertise, quality, and fast turnaround. 

Position Overview 

We are seeking an experienced and motivated General Manager to lead the daily operations of their rubber lining shop. This role requires a hands-on leader who can effectively manage employees, oversee projects, maintain customer relationships, and drive business growth. The General Manager will be responsible for ensuring efficiency, quality, and profitability while upholding company standards for safety and service. 

What you’ll be doing: 

Operational Leadership: 

Plan, schedule, and oversee employee shifts and work assignments. 
Ensure projects are completed on time, within budget, and to quality standards. 
Monitor shop performance and implement process improvements.

title: Cloud ERP Consultant, SAP
description:
Privacy Policy
Job Openings
Cloud ERP Consultant, SAP
Ireland (Remote)

Cloud ERP Consultant

Full-time/Permanent
Location: UK & Ireland, work-from-home

Travel Required: Must be available to travel to client sites as needed. 

 

We’re growing our Business Suite team and are looking for a Cloud ERP Consultant to help deliver next-generation ERP solutions for organisations with £50m to £500m turnover. This role sits within our Cloud Business Suite practice, working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.




We’re looking for candidates who can thrive in an ERP cloud environment — people who understand how to help clients adopt standardised, scalable solutions, and who are comfortable working across a broad range of responsibilities. Direct experience with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud ERP is valuable, but not required, as we are open to other Cloud ERP and finance platforms.




If you’ve delivered cloud-based projects, are quick to adapt, and are keen to learn and develop, we’d be pleased to hear from you.

 

As a Cloud ERP Consultant, you will:

Lead and support workstreams on cloud ERP implementations, helping clients adopt fit-to-standard processes with an outcome-led delivery approach.
Facilitate workshops, gather requirements, and translate business needs into scalable cloud-based solutions.
Configure and optimise processes across a wide range of operational areas, aligned to client goals and standard solution capabilities.
Support clients through training, testing, go-live readine

title: Youth Peer Support Worker
description:
Privacy Policy
Job Openings
Youth Peer Support Worker
Youth Mental Health Program - St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador

Association for New Canadians is a non-profit, community-based organization dedicated to the provision of settlement and integration services for immigrants and refugees. 

 

Job Title: Youth Peer Support Worker 

Location: St. John’s, NL 

Position Type: 10 Temporary Part-time positions 

Closing date: Until Filled 

 

Reporting to the Provincial Training Facilitator, the Youth Peer Support Worker provides non-clinical, peer-based

support to youth accessing the program. Grounded in lived or living experience, the role focuses on building connection, trust, and hope through mentorship, relational engagement, and strengths‑based support. The Peer Support Worker walks alongside youth as they navigate challenges, develop skills, and access community resources. 

This position is non‑clinical in nature and does not involve counselling, therapy, crisis intervention, diagnosis, assessment, or case management. 

Hours & Location: 10 hours per week. Primarily based at an English as an Additional Language school, with some community or school‑based work. Hours are flexible. 

 

 

Roles and Responsibilities: 

 

Build safe, respectful, and trusting relationships with youth participants 
Provide one-on-one and/or group peer support through shared lived experience 
Offer emotional support, encouragement, and validation in a non-judgmental way 
Support youth in

SUMMARY OF DUTIES

Our organization is seeking a qualified and motivated candidate to support the delivery of IT services. The successful candidate will demonstrate sound judgment, initiative, and a strong commitment to client service and operational excellence.

Under the supervision of the LEITP Team Manager, the incumbent will perform the following key responsibilities: 

Provide technical support for the program’s IT infrastructure, including networks, workstations, and mission-critical systems
Diagnose, resolve, and document IT incidents and technical issues affecting users
Provide guidance and training to employees on the effective use of IT systems and tools
Maintain logs and documentation, including incident records, change control logs, and

JOB PORTAL

 Job Posts DevX Software Engineer

DEVX SOFTWARE ENGINEER

Global Technology Solutions (GTS) at ResMed is a division dedicated to creating innovative, scalable, and secure platforms and services for patients, providers, and people across ResMed. The primary goal of GTS is to accelerate well-being and growth by transforming the core, enabling patient, people, and partner outcomes, and building future-ready operations.

The strategy of GTS focuses on aligning goals and promoting collaboration across all organizational areas. This includes fostering shared ownership, developing flexible platforms that can easily scale to meet global demands, and implementing global standards for key processes to ensure efficiency and consistency.

The primary role of Engineering function within Product Development team is to create specifications and designs for new products or improvements and enhancements to existing products. Works closely with customers, developers and other stakeholders to understand and define customer needs in these designs. Features are aligned to a timetable and areas of responsibility. Developers may solicit customers for feedback regarding product usability and desired future enhancements. Software Engineers who design, write and test code for the product should be matched in the either Software Engineering Applications or Systems. Product developers who specialize in hardware systems

JOB PORTAL

 Job Posts Global Senior Analyst

GLOBAL SENIOR ANALYST

We are looking for a Global Senior Analyst to join our team in Poland or in Halifax.

The Senior Analyst is a global mechanisms owner responsible for building scalable, standardized, and increasingly automated decision systems across Customer Service. This role leads end-to-end work across Analytics & Reporting, Central Data Platform enablement, Causal Analysis, and Planning & WFM partnership to drive measurable improvements in service performance, efficiency, cost-to-serve, and customer/employee experience.

This role is intentionally technology-forward: Senior Analysts do not just “report results”they create repeatable mechanisms that detect issues early, explain KPI drivers, and trigger action across time zones, while continuously exploring new technologies (AI/ML, GenAI, automation, rules engines, workflow orchestration) to reduce manual effort and accelerate decision-making.

The ideal candidate has a strong curiosity and open mindset, constantly challenges the status quo, and actively looks for ways to simplify, standardize, automate, and eliminate waste—while fully respecting legal, regulatory, and privacy requirements, and ensuring fairness, auditability, and human accountability in decisions that impact people or customers.

Senior Analysts do not just “report results” they create repeatable mechanisms that detect issues early,

 Job Posts Website And Social Media Coordinator

WEBSITE AND SOCIAL MEDIA COORDINATOR

This role is made for someone who is full of creative ideas, thrives on timelines, and is committed to outstanding results. You’re creative, dependable, and comfortable juggling different kinds of work in a fast-moving environment.

You know how to make content look good, sound good, and stay on brand. You manage your time well, and bring steady progress and stability to the team.

You’re also someone who values clear communication, strong relationships, and work that supports real people and communities.

Key Responsibilities

Develop and implement social media strategy across various industries
Create graphics
Write creative content
Manage social media posting schedules across all social platforms
Design, update, and maintain websites using WordPress and related templates

Qualifications

Proven successful experience in driving conversions through social media marketing
Experience with Adobe Creative Suite including Illustrator, Photoshop, Acrobat Pro
Working knowledge of WordPress
Strong writing and editing skills
Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines
Strong attention to detail
Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team

How to Apply
Please send your resume, a short cover letter, and samples of relevant work.

SENIOR ANALYST, IDENTITY ACCESS & DATA (GLOBAL SECURITY)

Job Description

WHAT IS THE OPPORTUNITY?
As the Senior Analyst, you will be responsible for providing technical support for services supported by our provisioning pillar across RBC & its subsidiaries within the Identity & Access Management (IAM) team with a focus on RSA Token, and Microsoft Entra ID; coordinating & reporting on various key IAM controls, as well as management of internal knowledge base & service catalog.

The analyst will also be analyzing the reported-on data & identifying opportunities for further operational efficiencies and automation through collaboration with other IAM pillars.

Looking for a strong individual who will have the opportunity to build on the current team’s skillset & expand it to further support RBC & its subsidiaries by coordinating, developing, leading, communicating and executing activities to ensure objectives are accomplished accordingly on time.

WHAT WILL YOU DO?

Create and maintain dashboard, knowledgebase, and service catalog of supported items on an ongoing basis.

SENIOR MANAGER, IDENTITY EXPERIENCE (GLOBAL SECURITY)

Job Description

What is the opportunity?
As the Senior Manager, Identity Experience, a key focus will be developing and delivering executive-level presentations to communicate IAM’s strategic direction and impact.

Building influential relationships with stakeholders will be critical in advancing IAM priorities in a complex environment. You will navigate ambiguity and competing priorities to steer initiatives toward successful outcomes. As a champion of change, you will identify IAM trends, pilot innovative solutions, and foster a culture of continuous improvement.

This role demands a blend of strategic vision, collaborative leadership, and technical acumen to shape the future of IAM at RBC

What will you do?

Act as the storyteller for IAM, building brand awareness across RBC
Create and deliver C-suite level presentations on behalf of IAM Senior Leadership to communicate strategic direction, demonstrate business impact, and build organizational brand awareness for IAM initiatives.

 Job Posts Senior Technical Manager, IAM Onboarding (Global Security)

SENIOR TECHNICAL MANAGER, IAM ONBOARDING (GLOBAL SECURITY)

Job Description

What is the opportunity?
The Identity and Access Management (IAM) Onboarding Team is looking for a Senior Technical Manager, IAM Onboarding to assume a leadership position and work towards onboarding applications to RBC’s Customer Identity Access Management (CIAM) service (Okta) in accordance with the IAM onboarding strategy and IAM goals.

This role will require you to work with a wide range of technology and business stakeholders to implement IAM solutions. You will identify business problems and opportunities in the context of the requirements and recommend solutions that enable the organization to achieve its goals and meet sponsor/stakeholder needs.

We are looking for an ambitious, adaptable, and proactive individual with knowledge in the IAM and cloud computing space, who challenges the status quo, is constantly thinking about flexibility, robustness, and simplicity in everything we do.

What will you do?

Meet with application development teams to understand their authentication requirements and SSO integration needs
Review application architecture and deployment environments to assess CIAM (Okta) compatibility
Work with business partners and application teams to ensure successful end-to-end onboarding for the CIAM services.

SENIOR CYBER SECURITY SPECIALIST, IAM (GLOBAL SECURITY)

Job Description
What is the opportunity?
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Cyber Security Specialist (Global Security) to join our Enterprise Identity and Access Management (EIAM) Onboarding Team. The successful candidate will be responsible for onboarding applications to our IAM services, including SailPoint IIQ, and ServiceNow. This role requires collaboration with various stakeholders, analysis of business requirements, and implementation of IAM solutions to meet organizational goals.

What will you do?
Identity & Access Management

Onboard and Lead applications onboarding to IAM services (SailPoint and ServiceNow), ensuring alignment with organizational strategy and security objectives
Manage data remediation initiatives within the SailPoint IAM platform, including orphan record cleanup, role governance, and Segregation of Duties (SoD/Toxic Combination) policy implementation
Ensure IAM data quality and security controls meet enterprise standards prior to deployment
Collaborate with business partners on data remediation tasks including role creation, description refinement, and SoD policy establishment
Communicate IAM requirements, onboarding procedures, and security frameworks to business units and application teams across RBC Enterprise

 Job Posts Operational Risk Manager – Finance IT, GFT

OPERATIONAL RISK MANAGER – FINANCE IT, GFT

What is the Opportunity
In this hands-on technical role, you will support and provide technology risk control and advisory services to Finance & Audit Technology and CFO Group management. Services include IT & operational risk analysis, risk & compliance reporting, risk awareness & advisory and audit liaison. You will assess and manage to ensure on-going compliance with rapidly evolving technology management policies & standards. Including automation, data analysis, and reporting.

You will be a member of the Finance IT Operational Risk Management team which is collectively responsible for provision of technical services, IT operations engineering, production support, quality engineering, Risk Management and business management across a portfolio of over 100 production applications. You will have ample opportunity to develop your professional skills and positively influence technology risk practices across RBC’s Global Functions Technology (GFT) group.

What will you do?

Identify and assess IT & operational risks across a large & diverse portfolio of applications, 40% of which are subject to stringent SOX & SOC1 control standards
Test Controls and document results/conclusions specific to MRA requests, Bank examinations, and/or any Regulatory requests
Monitor and report on risk exposures, includi

Position Description:
We are seeking an experienced Intermediate to Senior Project Manager to lead the planning, execution, and delivery of complex projects across business, technology, and operational environments. The successful candidate will manage scope, schedule, budget, risks, stakeholders, vendors, and delivery teams while ensuring strong client engagement and high-quality project outcomes.

This role is well suited for a project manager who can operate independently, communicate confidently with senior stakeholders and clients, and bring structure, discipline, and momentum to cross-functional initiatives.

Your future duties and responsibilities:

Manage end-to-end project delivery, including initiation, planning, execution, monitoring, control, and closure.
Define project scope, objectives, deliverables, success criteria, timelines, budgets, and resource plans.
Serve as a primary point of contact for clients, maintaining strong working relationships and ensuring clear communication throughout the project lifecycle.
Lead client-facing meetings, project status updates, steering committees, workshops, and governance forums.

About Us
The only tool you need to outsmart social 📈

Dash Social is a social media management platform that equips brands with intelligence and speed to stay ahead of the curve. Through its sophisticated cross-channel insights and workflow tools, Dash Social enables brands to create content that entertains, engages and drives consistent business results. To discover how Dash Social is empowering brands to outsmart social, visit dashsocial.com.

At Dash Social, you will be given the opportunity to take risks, learn, and grow your career. You’ll be joining a talented, hardworking team with leading policies and practices recognized as a top employer in Canada.

As a Sr. Product Manager, you will own the end-to-end strategy and roadmap for a dedicated product or customer journey and provide formal leadership to a cross-functional development team. This includes defining the product vision and strategy for your defined area of expertise.

You’ll also help define how AI shows up across your product pillar – from copilots that accelerate customer workflows to agentic features that handle work autonomously – and you’ll use AI tooling yourself to move faster on research, specs, and analysis.

Job Description
Overview



At KPMG in Canada, our people bring their unique perspectives to Canada’s most important challenges. Here, you can build momentum that reaches beyond our business, develop skills for the future, and take ownership of your career with support at every stage. Join a firm where your career can make a difference.

 

Valuation is a collaborative, insight-driven discipline that sits at the intersection of strategy, capital markets, accounting, tax, and data. With one of the largest and most respected teams of accredited business valuators in Canada, we are trusted in complex, high-stakes situations where judgment, credibility, and perspective matter. Our work is strengthened through collaboration across service lines and sectors, allowing us to deliver valuations that are technically rigorous, commercially informed, and strategically relevant.

 

Innovation and collaboration are central to how we work. We actively invest in advanced technologies, data analytics, and the responsible use of AI to enhance insight, efficiency, and quality, while operating within a strong governance and professional standards framework. You will join a highly collaborative culture that values diverse perspectives, knowledge-sharing, and cross-functional problem solving, supported by connections ac

Salary: $82,016 - $106,621 per annum (HL-23), 37.50 hours per week

Benefits: Onboarding

Position Details

Department of Social Supports and Well-Being

The Clinical Program Supervisor (CPS) is an integral leadership role within the Social Supports and Well-Being (SSWB) program areas and is suited to employees with strong organizational knowledge, clinical expertise, and experience working in complex service environments. The CPS provides leadership for programs delivered under the Children Youth and Families Act, Adoptions Act, Young Persons Offences Act, and the Youth Criminal Justice Act. This role includes clinical supervision of social workers, social worker assistants, community service workers, and administrative staff; oversight of SSWB service delivery; and leadership in case planning. The CPS works closely with Prevention Services, Innu Round Table Secretariat (IRTS) and must ensure all services align with the Innu-CSSD Protocol, including culturally grounded practice, legislated information

• Comply with all SSHE policies and standards
• Apply the SSHE Management System as appropriate to the relevant area of the business
• Comply with Company's Well Design and Operations Management Standards, Statutory Regulations and Industry Guidance Notes.

The purpose of the Completion Responsible role is to ensure a structured, traceable, and efficient completion and handover process throughout the project lifecycle. The role is responsible for establishing fit-for-purpose completion structures, maintaining high-quality documentation and data, and coordinating Mechanical Completion, Preservation, Commissioning, and handover activities in accordance with project requirements and company standards.

The role contributes to predictable and efficient project execution by reducing the risk of delays, ensuring compliance, and supporting the timely handover of systems, facilities, and documentation to operations.

title: Senior Firmware Developer
description:
Welcome to the Kraken Robotics Career Center

Senior Firmware Developer

Senior Firmware Developer

NEW CAREER OPPORTUNITY




Build your career with Kraken Robotics. Make a difference to others. If innovation drives you, and you want a career that makes a difference to the world, helping humanity overcome the challenges in our oceans – safely, efficiently, and sustainably – then come join us at Kraken Robotics.




Kraken Robotics is currently recruiting for a Senior Firmware Developer to join our Mount Pearl, NL office, Dartmouth, Nova Scotia office or remote may be considered. 




We are seeking a skilled and motivated Senior Firmware Developer to join our software team focused on the development of our Towed Systems. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining embedded firmware for sensor integration, power management, and communication interfaces used on these marine sensor platforms. 

 

ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES 

Design, develop, and debug embedded firmware for microcontrollers and real-time operating systems (RTOS). 
Develop and optimize firmware for real-time control, navigation, telemetry, and data logging systems. 
Implement robust communication protocols (CAN, RS-485, Ethernet, UART, SPI, I2C, etc.) for subsea environments. 
Ensure firmware reliability under extreme underwater conditions including pressure, temperature, and EMI. 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (mechanical, electrical, and software) to support sys

title: Senior Firmware Developer, SeaPower/Senior-Firmware-Entwickler, SeaPower
description:
Welcome to the Kraken Robotics Career Center

Senior Firmware Developer, SeaPower/Senior-Firmware-Entwickler, SeaPower

Senior Firmware Developer, SeaPower/Senior-Firmware-Entwickler, SeaPower

NEW CAREER OPPORTUNITY




Build your career with Kraken Robotics. Make a difference to others. If innovation drives you, and you want a career that makes a difference to the world, helping humanity overcome the challenges in our oceans – safely, efficiently, and sustainably – then come join us at Kraken Robotics.

 

Kraken Robotics is currently seeking a Senior Firmware Developer to join our team in Rostock, Germany or Dartmouth, NS.




The Senior Firmware Developer will work on the SeaPower product line, delivering high-reliability energy storage and power management systems for subsea and marine environments. In this role, you will develop embedded firmware for Battery Management Systems (BMS) and Energy Storage Systems (ESS) used in mission-critical applications. 




As a senior contributor, you will take ownership of complex firmware components, influence architecture and development practices, and work closely with electrical, mechanical, systems, software, QA, and production teams to ensure robust, well tested, production ready solutions across the full product lifecycle.




Roles and Responsibilities

Design, develop, and debug bare metal embedded firmware for microcontrollers.
Mentor early career firmware developers through regular code reviews, design guidance, and techni

Mydoh is a money app for youth 6 - 17. Mydoh helps youth make informed decisions, and gain real-life money experience while giving parents transparency and oversight. Our digital platform enables youth to practice earning, saving and spending money, creating an opportunity for conversations between youth and parents on the principles of financial literacy.  Job Posts Senior Manager, IAM Process & Control Assessment (IAM Process & Compliance)

SENIOR MANAGER, IAM PROCESS & CONTROL ASSESSMENT (IAM PROCESS & COMPLIANCE)

Job Description

What is the Opportunity?
In this Senior Manager, IAM Process & Control Assessment role, you will drive identity and access management control compliance assurance through framework for control impact assessments including triage, analysis, and governance while simultaneously contributing to the design and standardization of end-to-end IAM processes across multiple platforms. This enables leadership to ensure IAM controls are properly managed, deviations are rigorously governed, processes are standardized and efficient, and the organization maintains a robust compliance posture while enabling secure innovation.

What Will You Do?

Control Impact Assessment & Governance: Receive, triage, and analyze all Control Impact Assessment requests; perform structured gap analysis identifying impacted IAM controls (LASS, SOX, NIST); evaluate compensating controls for adequacy and residual risk; maintain centralized exception registry; coordinate annual attestations; communicate decisions to stakeholders; track exception trends to identify systemic compliance gaps.
Maintain centralized registry of all CIA requests, approvals, and exceptions for audit trails and compliance reporting.
Coordinate annual attestation cycles requiring

 Job Posts Senior IAM Systems Engineer, Authorization (Global Security)

SENIOR IAM SYSTEMS ENGINEER, AUTHORIZATION (GLOBAL SECURITY)

Job Description

What is the opportunity?
The Senior IAM Systems Engineer, Authorization is a pivotal role responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining enterprise-grade authorization solutions that enhance security, compliance, and operational efficiency. This role operates at the intersection of automation, DevSecOps, and enterprise authorization platforms, driving the evolution of RBC’s identity and access management (IAM) strategy.

As part of the Platform Enablement Engineering team, this engineer will collaborate with security, infrastructure, application, and compliance teams to establish a robust authorization framework. The focus will be on policy-driven access control, dynamic entitlement management, and centralized attestation services, ensuring seamless integration with RBC’s diverse systems and platforms.

Authorization is a strategic pillar of RBC’s IAM roadmap, directly improving risk management, regulatory compliance, and user experience by ensuring precise, context-aware access controls across the enterprise.

What will you do?

Design and implement enterprise authorization solutions using Open Policy Agent (OPA) with Rego for fine-grained, policy-as-code access control.
Develop and maintain authorization policies in JSON-structured

 Job Posts Senior Manager, IAM Design & Controls (Global Security)

SENIOR MANAGER, IAM DESIGN & CONTROLS (GLOBAL SECURITY)

What is the Opportunity?
The Senior Manager, IAM Design & Controls will work towards design and control assessment of applications to RBC’s Identity and Access Management solutions in accordance with the IAM strategy and IAM goals.

You’ll play a key role in developing and maintaining authentication API endpoints while ensuring compliance with enterprise IAM standards and architectural guidelines. This is an exciting opportunity to work on critical identity infrastructure supporting Royal Bank of Canada’s digital ecosystem.

What will you do?

Work with business partners and application teams across RBC Enterprise and Brewin Dolphin, to review their changes and ensure they are aligning to IAM Controls through the Athena process.
Review and validate architecture documents against IAM standards and established patterns
Cross collaborate on identity management initiatives across multiple platforms (Azure, Okta, Entra ID)
Investigate and implement endpoint encryption and API security best practices
Contribute to policy management and compliance verification processes
Provide consultative services to ensure application teams are following RBC Standards.
Provide support with tasks and ad-hoc requests as required.
Function as point of escalation and resolution for incidents and

About Resmed
We pioneer innovative solutions that treat and keep people out of the hospital, empowering them to live healthier, higher-quality lives. Our digital health technologies and cloud-connected medical devices transform care for people with sleep apnea, COPD, and other chronic diseases. Our comprehensive out-of-hospital software platforms support the professionals and caregivers who help people stay healthy in the home or care setting of their choice. By enabling better care, we improve quality of life, reduce the impact of chronic disease, and lower costs for consumers and healthcare systems in more than 140 countries. Our 2030 operating model intends to improve 500 million people’s lives and help them achieve their full health potential.

 Job Posts Senior Red Team Operator, Adversary Emulation (Global Security)

SENIOR RED TEAM OPERATOR, ADVERSARY EMULATION (GLOBAL SECURITY)

What’s the Opportunity?
RBC Adversary Emulation is hiring experienced Red Team Operators and Penetration Testers. We’re looking for professionals to join us in delivering scenario-driven Red Team operations, Purple Team exercises, and offensive security research targeting core and emerging business functions.

In this role, you’ll work alongside a highly skilled team of offensive and defensive security experts on complex operations. You’ll have access to industry-leading tools and training — including private, team-specific sessions delivered by top experts in the field — ensuring you’re always sharpening your edge in a high-maturity environment.

This is a unique opportunity for someone who thrives on continuous learning, problem-solving, and refining their craft within a large enterprise.

What Will You Do?

Execute Red Team operations, Purple Team exercises, and hypothesis-led engagements in mature production environments.
Lead projects end-to-end from scoping and proposal writing, through execution, reporting, and stakeholder debriefs.
Develop offensive capabilities: exploit development, novel C2 channels, automation, and more.
Mentor and provide technical guidance to junior team members.
Help evolve and improve team processes and service offerings.

DIRECTOR, ACCESS REQUEST CONTROL (GLOBAL SECURITY)

What is the Opportunity?
As Director of Access Request Control, your primary objective is to establish and maintain a robust access request control framework that ensures compliance with regulatory requirements and drives operational excellence in access provisioning and de-provisioning processes. You will collaborate closely with various teams across the organization to ensure that access request controls are adhered to, including timely revocation of access, proper procedure documentation, and adherence to established Service Level Agreements (SLAs).

What will you do?

Enforce IAM Access Request Controls: Oversee strict adherence to IAM policies and procedures for access requests, ensuring all approvals, reviews, and provisioning steps comply with organizational and regulatory standards.
Establish and Monitor Performance Dashboards: Develop real-time dashboards to track key metrics such as SLA adherence, approval cycle times, and compliance status. Proactively identify trends or deviations (e.g., SLA breaches) and implement targeted action plans to resolve issues and restore compliance (e.g., “green” status).

SENIOR IAM SYSTEMS ENGINEER, AGENTIC AI, DEVSECOPS (GLOBAL SECURITY)

What is the opportunity?
The Senior IAM Systems Engineer ,Agentic AI, DevSecOps is responsible for rolling out and integrating the enterprise AI / non-human identity (NHI) solution across the systems and platforms that consume AI agents, services, and workload identities. This role works across the organization partnering with AI platform, cloud, application, DevOps, and security teams to bring AI identity capabilities to the workloads and environments that need them. Reporting to the Director of NHI / AI Identity Engineering, this engineer bridges identity and the broader enterprise, turning an AI identity capability into a real, organization-wide control.

AI and machine identity is one of the fastest growing identity domains and a central pillar of the IAM strategy. This engineer will shape how the enterprise integrates and scales AI identity across a heterogeneous estate, working at the intersection of identity, cloud, and AI platform engineering directly enabling the safe adoption of AI at scale.

What will you do?

Lead integration of the enterprise AI / NHI identity solution with workloads and platforms across the organization, including AI platforms, cloud environments, container platforms, CI/CD pipelines, and application teams

LEAD WEB DESIGNER

Description
VERB is a digital marketing agency located in downtown Halifax, Nova Scotia. Our global clients offer the opportunity to work and collaborate with some of the world’s biggest destinations, resorts, and travel brands—and with our employee travel credit, it’s easy to experience them for yourself. We take a balanced approach to work/life and have fun at the office– or wherever we happen to be working from. We are passionate about exceeding expectations and we thrive on jobs other agencies might find too big, or too difficult, or too fast.

Sound good? Great, here’s who we’re looking for…
The Lead Web Designer shapes the digital experiences that bring brands, destinations, and stories to life online. This role blends strategic insight, conceptual creativity, and hands-on design leadership to craft web platforms that are as intuitive as they are inspiring. You’ll work with multidisciplinary teams in building digital ecosystems that balance emotional storytelling with performance-driven design—where every interaction is crafted to connect, engage, and convert.

What You Will Do

Lead the direction for web initiatives, ensuring decisions made align with brand identity, user intent, business goals, and client vision.
Architect concepts that merge narrative-driven design with frictionless usability—shaping experiences that feel elevated, mode

description:
Company: Proviso
Position: Agentforce Architect
Location: Remote
Start Date: ASAP
Rate: W2 70-85/hr

Overview: We are seeking an Agentforce Architect / Engineer to design and implement AI-driven solutions using Salesforce Agentforce. This role will focus on building intelligent, enterprise-grade agents that automate workflows, enhance customer and employee experiences, and drive measurable business outcomes. This role requires strong experience in both consulting and hands-on implementation, including leading discovery sessions, translating business requirements into scalable solutions, and delivering production-ready agents.

The ideal candidate has deep Salesforce expertise, strong technical and architectural skills, and experience working in enterprise environments with cross functional stakeholders.

Qualifications
• 8+ years of professional experience in Salesforce development, architecture, and implementation
• Proven experience designing and implementing Agentforce solutions, including agents, topics, actions, and guardrails
• Strong consulting experience including client-facing discovery, requirements gathering, and solution design
• Hands-on experience building within Salesforce (Flows, automation, data models, and integrations) • Strong understanding of AI/agent lifecycle including design, build, testing, deployment, and optimization
• Experience integrating Salesforce with enterprise systems (APIs, ERP systems, data platforms, etc.)
• Strong understanding of Salesf

Strong Surface Freehold land experience is a necessity.   The Surface Land Analyst (Contractor) would represent The Client with the highest degree of professionalism and integrity when interacting with internal and external stakeholders.

This contractor position will report to the Surface Land Manager and you will join a team of other land professionals, supporting The Client's Surface Land portfolio. There may be an opportunity for this contract position to develop into a permanent position, based on company need.

Prepare and process of all documents required for land access for well-sites, pipelines and remediation/reclamation s

NSB Omega is searching for a Quality Assurance Analyst for our MAJOR Oil & Gas Client in Calgary, AB.

The Quality Assurance (QA) Analyst is responsible for supporting and maintaining the company's Quality Management System (QMS) to ensure compliance with industry standards, regulatory requirements, and internal quality policies. The QA Analyst will conduct audits, analyze quality data, investigate non-conformances, support corrective and preventive actions (CAPA), and collaborate with operational teams to drive continuous improvement across oil and gas operations, including drilling, production, transportation, and processing activities.

Key Responsibilities
Quality Management

Monitor and maintain compliance with company quality standards, procedures, and regulatory requirements.

Support the implementation and continuous improvement of the Quality Management System (QMS).

Ensure adherence to applicable industry standards, including ISO 9001 and relevant oil and gas regulations.

Review quality documentation, procedures, work instructions, and records for accuracy and compliance.

Auditing and Compliance

Plan, conduct, and document internal quality audits.

Assist with external audits conducted by clients, regulatory agencies, and certification bodies.

Detaljer:

Varighet: 15.08.2026 - 31.12.2027
Lokasjon: Drammen
Opsjoner: 4 x 3 mnd frem til 31.12.2028
Søknadsfrist: 10.06.2026, kl 12:00




Beskrivelse av oppdraget

Seksjon for Veg- og transportteknologi har systemeierskap og forvaltningsansvaret for Nasjonal kjerneløsning (NK) bestående av identifisering og prising av bompasseringer (AutoPASS IP), en formidlingssentral (AutoPASS HUB), en driftsplattform (AutoPASS OPS), løsning for automatisk og manuell gjenkjenning av kjøretøy (AutoPASS LPRS 2.0), samt et analyseverktøy og rapportgenerator (AutoPASS Analytics). NK er den sentrale delen til infrastrukturen for innkreving av bompenger i Norge – som er del av en større komponentbasert verdikjede. I tillegg til Nasjonal kjerne komponentene inngår denne verdikjeden også komponenter som f.eks. operatørenes og utstedernes systemløsninger.
Seksjon for Veg- og transportteknologi skal gjennom produkteierskapet til NK ivareta nødvendige elementer av utøvende systemeierskap som er delegert Statens vegvesen.

Regjeringen har bestemt at oppgavene innen informasjonsforvaltning skal samles i en fellestjeneste i Departementenes digitaliseringsorganisasjon (DIO), jf. områdegjennomgang om samordning av administrative tjenester i departementene. Beskrivelse av oppdraget

Helsedirektoratet ønsker å evaluere et enkeltstående tilskudd – Fagnettverk Huntington samt en vurdering av dagens organisering og om det er overlappende tilbud til målgruppen.

Evalueringsoppdraget innebærer at leverandør svarer ut hovedproblemstillinger med relevante spørsmål og kommer med forslag til forbedringer.

I en evaluering inngår tre hovedproblemstillinger

1. Hvilke effekter gir tilskuddene?

2. Er tilskuddsforvaltningen ivaretatt på en god nok måte?

3. Er tilskuddsordningen tilstrekkelig godt utformet?




Kvalifikasjoner

Skal-krav:

Det skal tilbys et team bestående av prosjektleder og relevante fagressurser med samlet kompetanse til å gjennomføre oppdraget.

Prosjektleder må ha erfaring med ledelse av kunnskapsprosjekter.

Teamet må samlet ha erfaring med gjennomføring av kvalitative og/eller kvantitative undersøkelser, analyser, evalueringer eller utredninger i offentlig sektor

Omega 365 Consulting er en ledende leverandør av dyktig prosjektpersonell til aktører innen olje, gass, fornybar energi og infrastruktur. Vi tilbyr et bredt utvalg av konsulentoppdrag, inkludert mange av de mest spennende prosjektene i Norge og i utlandet.




Detaljer:

Varighet: 01.07.2026 - 31.12.2026
Lokasjon: Oslo
Opsjoner: 12 måneder
Søknadsfrist 09.06.2026, kl 12:00




Beskrivelse av oppdraget

Riksantikvaren har behov for å leie inn bistand for en prosjektleder for å etablere digital saksflyt for Kirkebevaringsfondet (KBF).

Riksantikvaren (RA), Hovedorganisasjonen KA (KA) og Kirkerådet (KR) har et samarbeidsprosjekt hvor alle tre virksomhetene er representert. Alle virksomheten stiller med ressurser til prosjektet.

Prosjektleder vil ha ansvar for å planlegge, lede og gjennomføre prosjektet og levere de avtalte leveransene innenfor rammer og begrensninger som er definert av prosjekteier. Prosjektet skal implementere løsninger kartlagt gjennom et forprosjekt som ble gjennomført i 2025. Prosjektet har allerede kommet så langt at det er delt inn i tre delprosjekter, og løsningen er påbegynt. Oppgaven til prosjektleder vil derfor være å fullføre prosjektet.

Viktig leveranser vil være:

Bygge en saksflyt i eksisterende saksbehandlingssystem hos Riksa

Senior Technical Data Specialist
Senior Technical Data Specialist

Omega 365 Consulting is a leading supplier of highly skilled project personnel in the oil and gas, renewable energy, and infrastructure sectors. We offer a wide range of consultant assignments, featuring many of the most exciting projects in Norway and internationally.




Details

Duration: 03.08.2026 - 30.07.2027
Location: Stavanger





Assignment Description

The Yggdrasil project is one of the largest projects executed in Norway.

We are looking for a “Technical Data Special Specialist – EDDM (Engineering Design Data Management)” to strengthen our team.

Role and responsibility:

Perform verification and QA activities for all delivery lines on Yggdrasil

Follow up that contractors seamlessly deliver one uniformed data stream to all necessary consumers

Can build and maintain Power BI dashboards. Has skills in SQL and Python.

Experience with AI and data analysis, and their applications in automated quality control of data

Engineering background(mechanical, electrical etc) preferred. Project experience and experience with LCI is a plus.

Comfortable working with engineering data (tags, attributes, engineering documents) and able to understand the concepts behind them. What kind of equipment exist, which attributes we can expect on them and what documents they're typically part

Job description
 HRBP – Middle East

Who are we?
At Global Maritime, our remit is to meet the challenges of the sea. What truly sets Global Maritime apart in the world of maritime engineering consultancy is the combination of the intellectually stimulating work itself, our deeply collaborative culture, and the uniquely supportive leadership. Global Maritime stands out as the premier destination for maritime engineers due to our unique blend and unparalleled technical opportunities – the opportunity to shape the industry's future on globally significant, cutting-edge projects – within a supportive and collaborative international community. Combined with expert leadership that actively mentors your growth within a trusting environment.
 
Welcoming you to our team
You will join a high-performing regional team covering Azerbaijan, the U.A.E., Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Egypt.  Job Posts Network Engineer

NETWORK ENGINEER

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Network Engineer to support store network lifecycle activities. This role focuses on managing and maintaining Cisco Meraki-based network environments, including device lifecycle tracking, configuration validation, and operational reporting. The ideal candidate brings foundational expertise in cloud-managed networking, demonstrates strong collaboration and communication skills, and can effectively prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.

In this role, you will

Track and report on inventory KPIs related to network devices and lifecycle status
Monitor inventory levels and lifecycle stages of network hardware across store environments
Create, maintain, and update documentation related to network configurations, updates, and changes
Act as an escalation point for troubleshooting anomalies and identifying network-related issues
Validate and verify configurations of newly deployed Cisco Meraki devices
Ensure proper decommissioning and removal of lifecycle-completed devices from the Meraki Dashboard
Provide detailed and structured progress reports on network lifecycle activities to stakeholders
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including operations, engineering, and business stakeholders

What you’ll need to succeed (required skills)

7+ years of networking experience with a strong focus on Cisco

CYBERSECURITY ARCHITECT – CRITICAL NATIONAL INFRASTRUCTURE

About the role
As a Cybersecurity Architect – Critical National Infrastructure (CNI), you will make an impact by designing, improving, and operating security architecture and defense capabilities across complex cloud and hybrid environments. You will be a valued member of the cybersecurity team, working closely with cloud, infrastructure, and application teams to strengthen security posture and reduce organizational risk.

In this role, you will:

Design and implement security architectures across AWS and Azure environments, ensuring alignment with enterprise and regulatory standards
Lead and support advanced security operations, including monitoring, investigation, threat detection, and incident response
Develop and enhance detection capabilities across SIEM, EDR, and cloud-native tooling to improve accuracy and reduce noise
Drive incident response activities including triage, containment, remediation, and post-incident analysis
Partner with cross-functional teams to remediate vulnerabilities, harden systems, and reduce the overall attack surface

We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring 2–3 days per week in a Cognizan

 Job Posts Co-Op Content Creator

CO-OP CONTENT CREATOR

Meet QuickFacts?
QuickFacts is a Software as a Service (SaaS) company that organizes information and presents it on a searchable web-based application. We develop intricate, innovative software that is simple to use and saves our clients hours each day. Currently, we provide the solution to the insurance industry, offering brokerages a one-stop location for organizational workflows as well as all their carrier underwriting information, including custom-made comparisons, documents, training, and helpful tools.

We seek a dynamic, results-driven Co-Op Content Creator to join our team. The Co-op Content Creator will gain hands-on experience extracting key information from insurance manuals, wordings, and supporting documents to enhance our platform. You’ll also develop skills in preparing forms in Adobe and organizing accessible pages for clients to find and access essential documents easily. As you collaborate with the Comparison Team, you’ll gain a foundational understanding of insurance and learn what our clients need to make their jobs easier. This role is perfect for detail-oriented individuals looking to build expertise in content management, document organization, and insurance industry essentials!

 Job Posts Product Owner, Global CRM

PRODUCT OWNER, GLOBAL CRM

Introduction
Welcome to Gallagher – a global community of people who bring bold ideas, deep expertise, and a shared commitment to doing what’s right. We help clients navigate complexity with confidence by empowering businesses, communities, and individuals to thrive. At Gallagher, you’ll find more than a job; you’ll find a culture built on trust, driven by collaboration, and sustained by the belief that we’re better together. Whether you join us in a client-facing role or as part of our brokerage division, our benefits and HR consulting division, or our corporate team, you’ll have the opportunity to grow your career, make an impact, and be part of something bigger. Experience a workplace where you’re encouraged to be yourself, supported to succeed, and inspired to keep learning. That’s what it means to live The Gallagher Way.

Overview
As our organization enters a critical growth phase — including M&A activity, technology consolidation, and an enterprise CRM transformation — the Product Owner will play a key role in delivering the Salesforce roadmap across our Specialty and Wholesale divisions.

The Product Owner is responsible for translating business needs into clear, actionable requirements and ensuring the Salesforce platform supports day-to-day sales and client management across the customer lifecycle.

We have partnered with a Canadian-based marketing agency that is part of an independent Network of Agencies strategically located across the world to provide global reach and capabilities.

As a senior individual contributor within the department, you will be responsible for leading complex, high-impact process transformation initiatives. From identifying opportunities through to solution design, rapid validation, and implementation planning, you will work closely with stakeholders to shape and deliver transformation outcomes that combine process excellence with modern technology, including AI and automation.

You will act as a trusted advisor to stakeholders, using strong communication and influencing skills to diagnose business problems, challenge existing approaches, and design forward-looking, technology-enabled solutions. A key aspect of the role is defining how AI and automation can be applied to improve processes and supporting the organization in adopting these solutions effectively.

Job Description
What is the opportunity?

RBC’s AI Innovation team, within Technology & Operations, designs and delivers agentic AI solutions that transform how Risk and Compliance functions operate. We engage stakeholders to identify pain points and build AI-powered solutions – from intelligent document analysis and automated report generation to virtual agents that handle complex, manually intensive tasks. Working alongside subject matter experts, product owners, and engineering teams, we leverage large language models, agentic frameworks, and cloud infrastructure to bring these solutions to production.

This is a roving, high-impact role that will require parachuting into any risk or compliance domain area to deliver AI solutions. It is ideal for someone who is energized by building AI-powered automation and decision-making solutions. The challenges will be a mix of building from scratch and integrating existing systems.

What will you do?

Development: Design, build, and deploy agentic AI systems using Python, large language models, and modern AI frameworks. You will prototype rapidly and iterate solutions into production-grade systems that can interpret natural language queries, retrieve and validate information, automate complex analysis, and triage alerts.

REPORTING DATA ANALYST

Embark on a rewarding career with Sobeys Inc., celebrated among Canada’s Top 100 employers where your unique contributions drive success.

Role Overview
The Retail Media Post-Campaign Reporting Analyst is responsible for generating insightful, data-driven reports for retail media digital campaigns across multiple channels and platforms. This role combines technical analytics expertise with a strong understanding of retail media performance and audience analytics, helping commercial and sales teams evaluate campaign effectiveness and optimize future media investments.

Sobeys is full of exciting opportunities, and we are always looking for bright new talent to join our team! We currently have a full-time opportunity for a Reporting Data Analyst. This role is based out of one our offices located in Halifax, NS.

#LI-Hybrid #LI-VJ1

Develop and automate post-campaign reports for retail media campaigns across onsite, offsite, and in-store channels.
Pull, clean, and analyze large datasets from multiple sources including Snowflake, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), and reporting APIs (e.g., Meta, DV360, GA4).
Build, maintain, and enhance data workflows and dashboards in Python (pandas, NumPy, matplotlib), SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, or Datorama).

ML ENGINEER, AGENTIC AI RISK & COMPLIANCE, GFT

Job Description
What is the opportunity?

RBC’s AI Innovation team, within Technology & Operations, designs and delivers agentic AI solutions that transform how Risk and Compliance functions operate. We engage stakeholders to identify pain points and build AI-powered solutions – from intelligent document analysis and automated report generation to virtual agents that handle complex, manually intensive tasks. Working alongside subject matter experts, product owners, and engineering teams, we leverage large language models, agentic frameworks, and cloud infrastructure to bring these solutions to production.

This is a roving, high-impact role that will require parachuting into any risk or compliance domain area to deliver AI solutions. It is ideal for someone who is energized by building AI-powered automation and decision-making solutions. The challenges will be a mix of building from scratch and integrating existing systems.

What will you do?

Development: Design, build, and deploy agentic AI systems using Python, large language models, and modern AI frameworks. You will prototype rapidly and iterate solutions into production-grade systems that can interpret natural language queries, retrieve and validate information, automate complex analysis, and triage alerts.

 Job Posts Director, Identity Data And Workflow Engineering (Global Security)

DIRECTOR, IDENTITY DATA AND WORKFLOW ENGINEERING (GLOBAL SECURITY)

Job Description
What is the opportunity?

The Director of Identity Data & Workflow Engineering leads the engineering strategy and delivery of identity data services, workflow automation, and cross-product IAM APIs across the Enterprise Identity and Access Management (EIAM) ecosystem. This role owns the engineering capabilities that power identity request workflows, privileged account inventory, global directory services, and the API layer that enables consistent, secure access to IAM capabilities across the enterprise.

Identity data and workflow engineering is foundational to delivering secure, efficient, and scalable identity services. The quality and accessibility of identity data — and the workflows and APIs that act on it — directly determine how quickly the organization can onboard users, detect risk, and respond to regulatory demands. This leader will build and operate the platforms that turn identity data into a strategic asset and provide a trusted foundation for downstream consumers including controls, reporting, governance, and emerging AI capabilities.

What will you do?

Solution Delivery, development, engineering and integration
Own the engineering roadmap and delivery for IAM workflow platforms, privileged account inventory, global di
